name: krwenholz-dotfiles
description: Kyle Wrenholz's personal Claude Code skills and hooks

plugins.name: pr-description-writer
plugins.description: Create draft pull requests on GitHub with concise, well-structured descriptions.

plugins.name: tuicr
plugins.description: Review local git changes with the tuicr TUI via a tmux split pane.

plugins.name: kyles-voice
plugins.description: Rewrite or draft text to match Kyle's direct, practical writing voice.

plugins.name: jj-git-guard
plugins.description: Prevents Claude from using git commands in Jujutsu (jj) repositories.
